name: Flaming Star (Greater)
description:
A sheen of red crosses the surface of this star-shaped goldstone medallion when the light hits it. The affixed armor or weapon is warm to the touch. The spell attack roll of any spell cast by Activating this item is +14, and the spell DC is 24.

Armor You gain resistance 5 to fire.
Weapon After you cast a fire spell by Activating the star, your Strikes with the weapon deal an additional 1d6 fire damage until the end of your next turn.

Effect: Flaming Star - Armor

Effect: Flaming Star - Weapon

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You cast Ignition.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast Fireball.

DC 24 Reflex check
